dataset.name: data/final_v2 (taxonomy v2, 6-class)
dataset.construction: auto_relabel.py: CLIP zero-shot re-typing of existing crops, coarse-label-constrained; recovered 20,082 previously-discarded Roboflow 'Damage' boxes; confidence floor 0.55 (unify_to_yolo --min-conf)

phase2.stop_reason: manual stop at plateau (val mAP flat ~7 epochs)
phase2.augmentations: mosaic=1.0, mixup=0.15, copy_paste=0.3, degrees=15, translate=0.2, scale=0.5, fliplr=0.5, hsv

training.notes: Phase 2 requires --no-amp: AMP makes seg_loss diverge to NaN at backbone unfreeze (the v1 attempt NaN'd ~epoch 77). --no-amp doubles VRAM so batch dropped 8->4 on the 24GB GPU.

metrics_test.note: Test split of data/final_v2 (1755 imgs). NOT the la aseguradora golden set (still pending coordination, T3.5).

known_limitations: paint_chip is weak (box mAP50 0.15, recall 0.15): rarest class + noisiest auto-labels (58% survived the 0.55 floor).
Labels are CLIP auto-generated (sampled human spot-check), not fully human-verified.
Domain gap: trained on public datasets, not real parking-claim phone photos.
Parts model (zones/part_category) not wired -> localize.py unused (T4.5).
status: experimental — not production-signed; pilot gate needs golden-set eval (T3.5)
